plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs to eliminate high risk.
Trim semiconductor and broad index exposure.
Increase allocation to income-focused QQQI.
Add new position in strong energy stock XOM.
Reduce SPY concentration to meet mandate.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with reduced leverage.
conservative.read: This plan aims for low, steady returns around 1.5% per month. It significantly reduces risk by cutting leverage and diversifying away from tech concentration. Drawdowns should be minimal.

plan: Reduce leveraged ETF exposure significantly.
Trim semiconductor and broad index holdings.
Reduce SPY concentration towards the 25% limit.
Increase position in strong tech name CRWD.
Add new position in strong energy stock XOM.
This plan balances growth with risk reduction.
balanced.read: This plan targets approximately 2.5% return per month by balancing risk reduction with growth opportunities. It lowers concentration and leverage while adding strength. Expect moderate drawdowns.

plan: Increase allocation to 3x leveraged SOXL.
Add to semiconductor SMH position.
Reduce broad index QQQ holdings.
Reduce SPY concentration towards the 25% limit.
Increase position in strong tech name CRWD.
Add new high-potential energy name GUSH.
aggressive.read: This plan aims for aggressive growth, targeting around 4% per month. It uses increased leverage and concentration in high-scoring names. Expect significantly higher potential gains and much larger potential drawdowns, especially with leveraged ETF decay.

plan: Sell all leveraged and high-beta tech/semis.
Reduce broad index exposure.
Significantly increase allocation to income-focused QQQI.
Add a substantial position in stable energy stock XOM.
Reduce SPY concentration to meet mandate.
This plan prioritizes steady income and capital preservation.
income.read: This plan focuses on generating steady monthly income, targeting around 1% per month. It shifts capital away from growth and leverage towards income-producing assets. Drawdowns are expected to be very low, but growth potential is also limited.
